MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Jun-23-2011 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-29-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 220

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Elizabeth R. Bain, Esq., of FOLEY & MANSFIELD (510-590-9513), appearing for defendant / moving party Calaveras Asbestos, Ltd.
James P. Nevin, Esq., of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Richard Bollinger, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT CALAVERAS ASBESTOS, LTD.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Calaveras Asbestos, Ltd.'s motion for summary judgment is denied and its alternate motion for summary adjudication is off calendar. Defendant did not satisfy its burden of production to show that plaintiffs do not have and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that Mr. Bollinger has an asbestos-related disease. By not referring to any responses by plaintiffs to contention discovery in its separate statement, defendant is unable to successfully invoke the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. Even if defendant did satisfy its burden of production, the declaration of Dr. Horn creates a triable issue whether Mr. Bollinger has an asbestos-related disease. Plaintiffs dismissed their claims for false representation and civil battery and their request for punitive damages, the issues as to which defendant moved for summary adjudication. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)
